page: Microsoft Azure E8as_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Easv7 server family. It is equipped with 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no onboard GPUs, and the configuration does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a memory-optimized resource. This configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute power, avoiding the expense of provisioning additional vCPUs simply to acquire more RAM. However, the lack of local storage and GPU acceleration represents a clear tradeoff for applications requiring high-speed local scratch space or parallel processing capabilities. The server is configured for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E8as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Easv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, though it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. The lack of local storage and hardware acceleration represents a tradeoff, but the high memory density provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound tasks without requiring excess compute allocation. The server is designed for workloads such as database management, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications that demand a high memory-to-CPU ratio.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring eight dedicated AMD vCPUs and sixty-four gigabytes of memory for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
